name: Brahian Rincon Sanchez
title: Senior QA Engineer | Automation |Manual | ISTQB
summary: Over the Past 5+ years , I’ve built my career as a QA Engineer, moving from manual testing into automation while discovering how much I enjoy ensuring reliable, high‑quality software, Leading team. I’ve worked with REST API testing, UI and cross‑browser validation, automation proces using Tools Like Selenium, Karate,Postman. And Agile/DevOps workflows, supported by my ISTQB certification. I also integrate AI tools into my daily work to optimize test Scenarios, speed up analysis, and improve efficiency.I’m always learning, refining my skills, and finding better ways to deliver dependable results that meet user needs. I’m excited to bring my passion for quality and automation expertise to new challenges and opportunities.
summary2: I am a Colombian professional with a background in Chemical Engineering, but my path naturally moved toward the IT world. I am passionate about software testing, quality assurance, and the growing impact of AI tools in this field. Discipline is one of my strongest qualities, and it helps me stay focused, learn quickly, and adapt to new technologies with ease.I enjoy reading, philosophy, and collaborating with people from different areas. Over the years, I have strengthened my soft skills and leadership abilities, and I remain open to continuous growth. Outside of work, I am an amateur cyclist and a fan of long walks in the woods. I am always open to expanding my skills and contributing to testing teams that value curiosity and quality.
